name: Feature Context Resolution
description: Resolves which features are relevant to the given task and builds a context block for prompt injection. Now includes fast-path optimization to skip Haiku CLI call when 1-3 candidates all score above confidence threshold (0.85), treating them as confirmed with confidence 1.0. Saves 2-5 seconds per task launch on simple refactors.

Models/FeatureContextResult.cs.content:
class FeatureContextResult
  RelevantFeatures: List<MatchedFeature>
  IsNewFeature: bool
  SuggestedNewFeatureId: string?
  SuggestedNewFeatureName: string?
  SuggestedKeywords: List<string>?
  ContextBlock: string
class MatchedFeature
  FeatureId: string
  FeatureName: string
  Confidence: double

patterns: Context block injection into Opus prompt
Haiku pre-flight call before main prompt construction
dependencies: Calls Haiku to match task to features
